items.title: SECRETARY BIRD
items.subtitle: COMMUNITY BOT
items.content:
Originally created to moderate and ban for disgusting chat messages, Secretary bird was then transferred to a certain Discord community I'm no longer a part of.

This bird bot used to answer the dumbest questions, announced Twitch streams and was also available to use Twitter.

By interacting with the bot we've found out that it's rather angry and loves pepsi and kit-kat alot.

On MAY 12th bot was shutdown due to it's services no longer being required and hosting expenses not worth it.

Nothing impressive, but it always got the job done, source code here.
